zh.lifeSummary: 當John Chamberlaine於1295年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾威克姆時，他的父親Richard I Chamberlain31歲，母親Joan de Gatesden27歲。他於1309年與Joan Morteyn在英國貝德福爾斯坦別利其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯坦別利其享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Chamberlaine于1295年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾威克姆时，他的父亲Richard I Chamberlain31岁，母亲Joan de Gatesden27岁。他于1309年与Joan Morteyn在英国貝德福爾斯坦別利其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年在英国英格兰貝德福爾斯坦別利其享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chamberlaine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chamberlain
meanings: English: status name from Old French chambrelain, Norman French cambrelanc, cambrelen(c) ‘chamberlain’ (of ancient Germanic origin, from kamer ‘chamber, room’, Latin camera (see Chambers ) + the diminutive suffix -(l)ing). This was originally the name of an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, but is so widespread in late medieval England that it must sometimes have been used of people of more ordinary status, perhaps as a nickname for an officious or self-important person or for someone who played the role of chamberlain in a folk play, tableau, or ceremony. Compare Chancellor for a possible similar usage.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Chamberlaine was born in 1295, in Wickham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard I Chamberlain, was 31 and his mother, Joan de Gatesden, was 27. He married Joan Morteyn in 1309, in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1349, in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Chamberlaine est né en 1295, à Wickham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard I Chamberlain, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan de Gatesden, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan Morteyn en 1309, à Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1349, à Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Chamberlaine 1295 in Wickham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard I Chamberlain 31 und seine Mutter Joan de Gatesden 27. Er hat 1309 in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England Joan Morteyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1349 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Chamberlaine è nato il nel 1295 nel Wickham, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard I Chamberlain, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Gatesden, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joan Morteyn nel 1309, nel Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1349, nel Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Chamberlaineが1295年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウィックハムで生まれた時，父Richard I Chamberlainは31歳，母Joan de Gatesdenは27歳であった。1309年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスタンブリッジでJoan Morteynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスタンブリッジで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Chamberlaine(이)가 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 윅함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard I Chamberlain(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Gatesden(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1309년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스탠브리지에서 Joan Morteyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스탠브리지에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Chamberlaine nasceu em 1295, em Wickham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard I Chamberlain, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Gatesden, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Morteyn em 1309, em Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1349, em Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Chamberlaine родился в 1295 г. в местности виккхам, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard I Chamberlain было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Gatesden, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Morteyn в 1309 г. в местности станбридж, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1349 г. в местности станбридж, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Chamberlaine nació en 1295, en Wickham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard I Chamberlain, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan de Gatesden, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joan Morteyn en 1309, en Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1349, en Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
